headline: CME Group (CME) Stock Could Be 4% Overvalued Despite Treasury Link Launch
summary: CME Group stock has delivered a 44.1% gain over the past 5 years, yet the current checks point to a company that does not clearly stand out as cheap, with its Excess Returns intrinsic value estimate sitting close to the market price while earnings based multiples lean rich. That tension, between a strong multi year return record and only a modest gap to intrinsic value, sets the stage for a closer look at what investors are paying for today.
